infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Travel Diary to access your camera to capture memories.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Travel Diary to access your location to tag where your memory took place.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Travel Diary to access your photos to save memories.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Travel Diary to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you choose an image.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Travel Diary to access your camera to capture memories.
